title: Save Loot Tables
description: Prevent Vanilla from discarding loot tables when one or more entries are invalid.
body:
Save Loot Tables is a server-side mod that prevents Vanilla Minecraft from discarding loot tables with invalid entries. 

It is available for 1.21 for NeoForge and Fabric.

## Patreon & Discord

**You can support me [on Patreon](https://patreon.com/c/noobanidus)!**

All support for this mod is available on [my Discord](https://noobanidus.com/discord). You can also keep up with what I'm doing and get notifications streams! For all other support, please click on "Report Issues" to the right of this description.
